jobs.title: Backend/API Engineer, Money as a Service
jobs.content: <p><strong><em>Note:</em></strong> <em>if you are an intern, new grad, staff, frontend or fullstack applicant, please do not apply using this link and visit our jobs page for those specific postings.</em></p><h2>Who we are</h2><p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses.</p>
